title: SKILLS ALL IN ONE
subtitle: A curated collection of professional AI Agent skills.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, tag, or author...
noResults: No skills found matching your search.
noFilesFound: No files found for this skill.
whatIsSkillSubtitle: Unlock the full potential of your AI Agent with specialized modular tools.
skillDesc1: Skills are standardized tools that allow agents to interact with external data, APIs, and systems.
skillDesc2: Unlike hard-coded logic, skills can be hot-reloaded into your agent environment at runtime.
skillDesc3: Based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), these skills work across multiple AI ecosystems.
setupSubtitle: Technical instructions for loading modular capabilities into production agents.
claudeCodeDesc: High-performance terminal agent by Anthropic. Supports global and project-level skill injection.
claudeStep1Desc: Ensure your folder contains a SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name & description).
claudeStep3Desc: Exit current session with /exit and run "claude" again to detect new skills.
claudeStep4Desc: Use "/skill-name" to trigger directly or use natural language to invoke the tool.
claudeTip1: Conflict: Global skills override project-level ones if names collide.
claudeTip2: Debug: Use "claude --debug" to view detailed skill loading logs.
missingAgentDesc: Help the community expand! If you have successfully integrated skills into a new platform, please contribute your technical steps via GitHub.
skillStructureDesc: A modular skill follows a strict hierarchical layout to ensure cross-platform compatibility.
noSkillsDescription: Try changing your keywords or clearing filters, or contact us to submit a new skill request.
noSkillsCreated: This author has no public skills yet.
authorIntro: Explore high-quality Agent skills developed by {{name}}. These tools help you build and automate more efficiently.
author: Author
valuesEstimates: Values are estimates and may vary by model.

binaryNotCopyable: Binary file cannot be copied as text
